POST /accounts/{account_id}/slurper/jobs.description: Creates a new R2 Super Slurper migration job to transfer objects from a source bucket (e.g. S3, GCS, R2) to R2.

PUT /accounts/{account_id}/slurper/jobs/.description: Cancels a specific R2 Super Slurper migration job. Any objects in the middle of a transfer will finish, but no new objects will start transferring.

PUT /accounts/{account_id}/slurper/jobs/.description: Pauses a running R2 Super Slurper migration job. The job can be resumed later to continue transferring.
